records.question: Which departments that have member_of records, course records, and minor_in records have the division exactly equal to 'EN', the department name exactly equal to 'Mathematical Sciences', and offer a course exactly named 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' with hours equal to 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE course.hours = '11' AND department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND course.cname = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS' AND department.division = 'EN'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.DNO
FROM Department d
INNER JOIN Member_of m ON d.DNO = m.DNO
INNER JOIN Course c ON d.DNO = c.DNO
INNER JOIN Minor_in mi ON d.DNO = mi.DNO
WHERE d.Division = 'EN'
  AND d.DName = 'Mathematical Sciences'
  AND c.CName = 'DISCRETE MATHEMATICS'
  AND c.Hours = '11'

records.question: What departments named Mathematical Sciences are in the EN division and Maryland building, have a phone number of at least 7195, and offer courses on MTW taught by faculty named Shih-Ping?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN faculty ON course.instructor = faculty.facid
WHERE department.dname = 'Mathematical Sciences' AND faculty.fname = 'Shih-Ping' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.building = 'Maryland' AND department.dphone >= 7195 AND course.days = 'MTW'

FROM Department
INNER JOIN Course ON Department.DNO = Course.DNO
INNER JOIN Faculty ON Course.Instructor = Faculty.FacID
WHERE Department.DName = 'Mathematical Sciences'
AND Department.Division = 'EN'
AND Department.Building = 'Maryland'
AND Department.DPhone >= 7195
AND Course.Days = 'MTW'
AND Faculty.Fname = 'Shih-Ping'
AND Faculty.Lname = 'Shih-Ping'
